{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Forge scales
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Forge scales]] can be hunted.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“If they won’t let you take one until our current mission is finished, then hunt dreadbeasts or Forge scales.”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
